function solve(words: string[]): number[] {

    if (words.length === 0) return [];

    const n = words.length;

    if (n === 1) return [0];

    // Compute left_max array

    const m = n - 1;

    const left_max: number[] = [];

        left_max[i] = commonPrefix(words[i], words[i + 1]);

    }

    // Compute prefix_max array

    const prefix_max: number[] = new Array(m);

    prefix_max[0] = left_max[0];

    for (let i = 1; i < m; i++) {

        prefix_max[i] = Math.max(prefix_max[i - 1], left_max[i]);

    }

    // Compute suffix_max array

    const suffix_max: number[] = new Array(m);

    suffix_max[m - 1] = left_max[m - 1];

    for (let i = m - 2; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_max[i] = Math.max(left_max[i], suffix_max[i + 1]);

    }

    // Now compute the answer

    const answer: number[] = new Array(n);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        let left_part_max = 0;

        if (i - 2 >= 0) {

            left_part_max = prefix_max[i - 2];

            cross_part = commonPrefix(words[i - 1], words[i + 1]);

        }

        answer[i] = Math.max(left_part_max, right_part_max, cross_part);

    }

    return answer;

}

    return answer;
